outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Live updates: Trump says Iran war is 'nearing completion' in address to the nation
outlets.summary: Coverage of Trump's prime-time address claiming core objectives nearly complete, with fact-checking of ceasefire and regime change claims.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Americans have little appetite for sending U.S. troops to Iran, polls show
outlets.summary: Polling data showing Americans oppose ground troops in Iran despite Trump's escalation rhetoric.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Watchdog blasts BBC, CNN, NYT for applying 'war crime' label almost exclusively to US-Israel
outlets.summary: CAMERA study: 88% of 'war crime' labels in major media directed at US/Israel, zero exclusively at Iran.

outlets.name: White House
outlets.headline: President Trump's Clear and Unchanging Objectives Drive Decisive Success Against Iranian Regime
outlets.summary: Official press release outlining war objectives: obliterate missile arsenal, annihilate navy, sever proxy support.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war: What is happening on day 33 of US-Israel attacks?
outlets.summary: Comprehensive Day 33 coverage: 400+ IDF strikes, Passover barrage, Kharazi struck, diplomatic developments.

outlets.name: Reuters
outlets.headline: Former Iran FM Kharazi badly wounded in strike, wife killed
outlets.summary: AFP report on airstrike targeting former FM Kharazi's home, killing his wife and injuring the diplomat.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Trump to reiterate 2-3 more weeks needed to finish Iran war
outlets.summary: Liveblog coverage of Day 33 including Iran Passover missile barrage and Trump's address.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Israel's Military Is Stretched to Breaking Point and Faces Familiar Deadly Stalemate in Lebanon
outlets.summary: Analysis of IDF strain across multiple fronts and familiar patterns in Lebanon ground campaign.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: IRGC claims hitting 100 Israeli targets in 61st wave of Operation True Promise 4
outlets.summary: IRGC claiming 100 Israeli targets struck in latest wave, framing continued resistance despite 33 days of strikes.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: IRGC Navy 'strongly hit' American vessel — FM says war against entire Islamic region
outlets.summary: State media claims IRGC Navy hit US vessel and frames conflict as broader war against Muslim nations.
